caption: A man is seen speaking outdoors in a news segment, wearing a light-colored shirt and a checkered shawl draped over his shoulders. He is positioned centrally, with other men standing behind him in the background, including one man in a light-colored shirt. An "ANI" logo is overlaid on his chest. The scene is framed by a red and white news graphic. A headline at the top reads "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". To the left and right, smaller profile photos and names of political figures appear, including "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "डिग्री CM", "सब्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिंदा", "मंत्री", "विजेन्द्र यादव", and "श्रवण कुमार". A red ticker at the bottom displays shifting text; it initially says "जे. पी. नड्डा: बिहार ने NDA को बहुमत दि", then changes to "जे.", and eventually "जे. पी.". A time stamp of "10:06 PM" is visible in the bottom right corner throughout the sequence.
